name: Reload
description: A committed action that transfers ammunition into a weapon before it can fire again.
design_notes: Reload turns ranged pressure into a pacing loop. It should define partial magazines, interruption, tactical reloads, animation sync, and what happens when inventory ammo is low.
design_purpose: Create downtime and vulnerability for ranged attacks.
Support weapon identity through magazine and reload behavior.
player_fantasy: The player feels the tension of preparing a weapon while danger continues around them.

parameters.name: magazine_capacity
parameters.description: Rounds held by the active weapon magazine.

parameters.name: reload_commit_frame
parameters.description: Frame where ammunition is actually transferred.

parameters.name: rounds_loaded_per_insert
parameters.description: Rounds restored per shell, clip, or magazine insert step.

parameters.name: reload_cancel_refund_rule
parameters.description: How canceling reload affects ammo state.

edge_cases: Reload interrupted by sprint, damage, weapon swap, or cutscene needs ammo transfer rules.
Client prediction must not duplicate ammo on cancel.
Auto-reload at zero ammo can conflict with manual reload input.
common_bugs: Ammo is added at animation start and duplicated after cancel.
Reload finishes visually but weapon state remains unable to fire.
Inventory reserve can go negative after rapid weapon switching.
balancing_notes: Long reload windows create tactical exposure; short reloads make ammo mostly cosmetic.
Per-round reloads are more flexible and should cost less total vulnerability per partial refill.
accessibility_notes: Use clear magazine and reserve indicators and avoid relying only on click sounds for empty weapons.

implementation_notes.unity: Represent reload as a weapon state with a commit frame or per-round insert event; transfer ammo from reserve to magazine only at the configured commit point.
implementation_notes.godot: Store magazine and reserve counts on the weapon resource or node, drive reload timers from _physics_process, and apply per-shell inserts from explicit state events.
implementation_notes.unreal: Implement reload in the weapon or Gameplay Ability state machine, using montage notifies for commit points while keeping ammo authority on the server.
implementation_notes.web: Model reload as a timed weapon state with reload_started_ms, commit frame, and cancel policy, then update magazine and reserve counts in one deterministic transaction.

relationships.reason: Reload needs a reliable timing window before the next valid firing action is accepted.
Reload state benefits from visible progress, cancellation, and ready feedback for weapons with longer cycles.
Reload restores firing availability and should share ammo authority with ranged attack validation.

example_games.title: Counter-Strike 2
example_games.note: Uses reload commitment as a tactical timing cost in firefights.

example_games.title: Resident Evil 4
example_games.note: Uses reload timing and ammunition pressure as part of combat pacing.
